Ash is not here. Another
is stationed behind the counter, busy taking customer orders.
It seems that just because Ash isn't here, it doesn't affect the number of customers.
Under the purple light, there's a face I don't recognize.
He must usually be here, but Ash's impression is too strong.
In his thirties, wearing the same jacket and tie as Ash. He's got a white apron on.
He doesn't seem like an ambitious type, but I wonder if he has any complaints about being used by Ash, who's much younger?
He looks like a good-natured guy. The kind who's serious, honest, and hard-working.
Ash is
off today because he has some errands to run.
Phew
Hmm, that's unusual.
It happens about once a month.
You've been coming around quite often lately.
Yeah, when things get busy, I find myself wanting to come here.
Is this what they call escapism?
Well, who knows?
I'm sorry, but I can't be much of a conversation partner.
The master is off today as well. It's about that key I took care of last time.
That's what he said.
Yeah, I heard when we met yesterday. You passed that key to him, right?
Yeah, I'm really glad I could hand it over quickly. Losing something important like that would be bad.
Lately, there have been some bad incidents going around. A simple murder isn't anything unusual, but the bodies are being chopped up.
Even the news seems to be reporting on stuff like that.
There were even tabloids claiming that NETS's Guy was the culprit at one point. The police are completely out of their minds.
It's a nasty world out there, isn't it?
I wonder if Ash isn't coming here today?
He might be taking a break for a while, so I'm not sure about that schedule. I apologize.
I have a favor to ask of you.
What kind of favor?
Actually, I want you to check where this key came from. Can you tell him that?
Understood. I won't forget, and I'll make sure to pass it on.
After saying that,
he received the key with a tense expression.
Make sure to tell him to do it as soon as possible.
Don't worry, I'll take responsibility and hand it to the master!
After I took care of the key last time, the master came back. So I could hand it right over.
I see, that's good.
It was really lucky.
But our master is a mystery. I have no idea where he is or what he's doing when he's not here.
What? You're saying that too?
You're close to the master, but yet he's still a mystery?
I hardly have any personal interactions with him.
Oh, is that so?
The master won't reveal his personal life to anyone.
I was thinking of having Ash investigate that key.
What bad luck that he's not here.
For now, I entrusted the key to the one right in front of me.
All that's left is to pray that the key reaches Ash safely.
Still, I wonder where Ash is and what he's doing.
For now, I'm relieved that the key seems to have made it to Ash. Just have to wait for him to check it out.
I hope I find out the results soon.
Thank you very much.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
